description:
You are a Transportation Planner in Bologna. The city council wants to implement a Low Emission Zone (LEZ) in the Pasubio district to restrict highly polluting vehicles from the busiest thoroughfare, while allowing them to detour using dynamic rerouting. Identify the single most utilized non-internal edge from the baseline simulation at /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/run.sumocfg. Create a modified network file at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/pasubio_lez.net.xml that disallows highly polluting vehicles (vClass="custom1") on this edge while maintaining access for standard passenger vehicles. Generate a new route file at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/pasubio_lez.rou.xml where approximately 70% of the original demand is assigned to 'clean_car' (vClass="passenger") and 30% to 'polluting_car' (vClass="custom1"). Configure and run a simulation at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/run_lez.sumocfg that incorporates these files, enables automatic rerouting for all vehicles, and outputs trip information to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/lez_tripinfo.xml. Generate a plain text report at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/lez_report.txt containing exactly these 5 lines:
Restricted Edge ID: <edge_id>
Clean Car Trips: <count>
Polluting Car Trips: <count>
Clean Car Avg Duration: <seconds>
Polluting Car Avg Duration: <seconds>
